## Summary

What does this pull request change?

## Why This Change Matters

Why should this be merged?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Localization update
- [ ] Security improvement

## How to Test

Describe the manual or automated steps used to test this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My change is focused and related to one clear goal
- [ ] I tested the parts I changed
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I did not include private data, secrets, or personal clipboard content

## Screenshots or Notes

Add screenshots for UI changes, or any extra review notes here.
